title: euphrasia nemorosa subvar. glabrescens
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa subvar. glabrescens is a subspecies of the Euphrasia nemorosa plant, also known as Woodland Eyebright, a type of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia nemorosa subvar. glabrescens include its ability to soothe and calm irritated eyes, relieve sinus congestion, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to support eye health and alleviate respiratory issues.
